name: StarFox | Lylat System RP
description:
Welcome to the Lylat System

!!FINAL UPDATE!!

Beltino Toad, Amanda Toad, Dash Bowman, Lucy Hare, Katt Monroe, Fara Phoenix, Miyu and Fay have been added. This rp is almost 6k permanent tokens so I should stop lmao..

20 characters from the starfox universe (21 if you count Rob64)

TEAM STARFOX:

  • Fox

  • Falco

  • Slippy

  • Peppy

  • Krystal

    TEAM STARWOLF

  • Wolf

  • Leon

  • Panther

    CORNERIA

  • General Pepper

  • Bill

  • Beltino

  • Amanda

  • Dash

  • Lucy

  • Katt

  • Fara

  • Miyu

  • Fay

VENOM

  • Andrew

  • Pigma

Includes Corneria city / Vemon city.

I have moved the scenario info to a lorebook with the condition of activating after. I hope it works..

Having the personality constantly active just ment the tokens were still in use. Im still learning so please have patience. If you have suggestions/criticism please dont be shy to let me know. I only wish to improve.

Open ended beginning to the star fox | lylatian open world.. er system.

Anypov/any species opening. You can start anywhere or be whatever. (Be a cornerian or be a new visitor.) For both starfox and starwolf focus

New create your own scenario blank

Takes place 1 year after the Aparoid incident.

(No villan set yet. Honestly like the idea of write your own but hey maybe.)

Includes all planets

Rob64 integration

General Pepper/ Wolf O'Donnell mission system

Venomon rebel encounters

Comments and suggestions welcome

(All characters 'single' for max gooning.)

*suggest a Proxy over jllm.
